title: pinus nigra subsp. laricio
intro: Pinus nigra subsp. laricio, also known as Calabrian pine or Italian pine, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Pinus nigra subsp. laricio include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, thanks to its high content of antioxidants. Pinus nigra subsp. laricio can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions, which are used to promote relaxation, relieve anxiety, and soothe respiratory issues.
